overall.description: Cinematic aerial footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a foggy night in Night City. The camera drifts past a towering residential megastructure and across elevated highways, showcasing neon-lit industrial architecture and atmospheric smoke plumes.

scene_state.functional_zone: aerial view of downtown megatower district

agents.ego_description: slowly drifting past the cityscape in a flying vehicle, observing the illuminated architecture through the fog

entered.detail: massive residential tower with uniform grid-patterned windows illuminated against the night sky
curving multi-level highway ramp structure winding through the city blocks
low-rise industrial complex with distinctive cyan-green neon lighting along its edges
tall vertical strip of red neon lighting attached to building facade
faint blue holographic advertisement billboard glowing in the distant fog
white smoke stacks rising from industrial facilities into the foggy atmosphere

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with an aerial view of Night City's downtown, dominated by a massive grid-windowed tower on the left. The camera drifts slowly past elevated highway structures and cyan-lit industrial buildings, with red neon signage cutting through the foggy atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway interchange and industrial zone

events.description: tall megatower exits frame left, revealing expansive view of elevated highway interchange

agents.ego_description: continuing to drift over the industrial district, focusing on the highway infrastructure below

entered.detail: tall industrial structure with red warning lights blinking at the top
complex junction of multiple highway levels with moving vehicle light trails

segments.scene_description: As the megatower exits the frame, the view opens up to reveal the complex network of elevated highways and industrial towers. Red warning lights blink atop distant structures while the camera continues its slow drift over the fog-shrouded interchange, with vehicle lights tracing paths along the roads below.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous aerial drift through a foggy urban canyon that gradually expands into a wide vista of a neon-lit industrial network. It begins beside a massive grid-windowed megatower, gliding past elevated highway structures and cyan-lit buildings where red neon signage pierces the thick haze. As the tower recedes from the frame, the perspective opens up to reveal a complex web of intersecting highways and towering industrial spires. The scene then shifts toward a broader view of the fog-shrouded interchange, where blinking red warning lights atop distant structures punctuate the skyline while vehicle lights trace glowing paths along the roads below.
